immediate.title: GAO Report: Only One in Four F-35s Fully Mission Capable
immediate.summary: Software shortcomings, spare parts shortages, and corrosion problems have left fewer than one-quarter of the U.S. military’s F-35 Joint Strike Fighters able to carry out all their missions at any given time in fiscal 2025, according to a new Government Accountability Office report. The post GAO Report: Only One in Four F-35s Fully Mission Capable appeared first on Air & Space Forces Magazine .
